message.content:
Here is the aligned transcript with the related code lines added to each entry:

```json
[
    {
        "text": "write some more neat code today so today",
        "code": [
            "class TrieNode:",
            "    def __init__(self):",
            "        self.children = {}  # a : TrieNode",
            "        self.word = False"
        ]
    },
    {
        "text": "so this is another problem from the",
        "code": [
            "class WordDictionary:",
            "    def __init__(self):",
            "        self.root = TrieNode()"
        ]
    },
    {
        "text": "structure to efficiently solve this",
        "code": [
            "    def addWord(self, word: str) -> None:",
            "        cur = self.root",
            "        for c in word:",
            "            if c not in cur.children:",
            "                cur.children[c] = TrieNode()",
            "            cur = cur.children[c]",
            "        cur.word = True"
        ]
    },
    {
        "text": "words so we're searching a word and the",
        "code": [
            "    def search(self, word: str) -> bool:",
            "        def dfs(j, root):",
            "            cur = root",
            "            for i in range(j, len(word)):",
            "                c = word[i]",
            "                if c == '.':",
            "                    for child in cur.children.values():",
            "                        if dfs(i + 1, child):",
            "                            return True",
            "                    return False",
            "                else:",
            "                    if c not in cur.children:",
            "                        return False",
            "                    cur = cur.children[c]",
            "            return cur.word",
            "        return dfs(0, self.root)"
        ]
    }
]
```

In this alignment, each relevant section of the transcript has the corresponding code snippet added under the "code" key. If no code was related to a particular entry, that entry is not included here as per the requirement to exclude entries with an empty "code" key.
